name: Beretta Ventures Ltd.
summary: Beretta Ventures Ltd. does not have significant operations. It intends to identify and evaluate assets or businesses with a view to complete a qualifying transaction. The company was formerly known as Folkstone Capital Corp. and changed its name to Beretta Ventures Ltd. in January 2021. Beretta Ventures Ltd. was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
